answer_relevancy.criteria: Cham diem muc do ACTUAL_OUTPUT tra loi dung trong tam INPUT, uu tien tinh ro rang va dung trong tam.
evaluation_steps: Xac dinh muc tieu chinh cua INPUT.
Kiem tra ACTUAL_OUTPUT co tra loi truc tiep muc tieu hay khong.
Tru diem noi dung lac de, thieu y, hoac khong tra loi cau hoi.

rag.faithfulness: Cham diem muc do ACTUAL_OUTPUT trung thuc voi RETRIEVAL_CONTEXT, phat hien thong tin khong co trong context.

task_completion.criteria: Danh gia agent co hoan thanh yeu cau trong INPUT theo EXPECTED_OUTPUT khong, uu tien ket qua dung va day du.
evaluation_steps: Doi chieu INPUT voi EXPECTED_OUTPUT de xac dinh ket qua can dat.
Kiem tra ACTUAL_OUTPUT co dat dung ket qua va muc do day du.
Tru diem neu co buoc thua, sai, hoac bo sot thong tin quan trong.

agent.tool_correctness: Danh gia TOOLS_CALLED so voi EXPECTED_TOOLS: dung tool can thiet, khong goi thua, khong bo sot tool quan trong.
